expectedIssues: BetRivers Exclusive Games badge shows 0 games
reportedIssues: The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the lower game tiles, hiding part of the last visible row and making those items feel cut off.

The top category rail is clipped on the right, with the last tab only partially visible ('Hot Ga...'), which makes the row look cramped.

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues describe a badge showing 0 games; they all concern layout clipping and overlap problems with game tiles and navigation elements.
